prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration in the style of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, presented as a dramatic vintage manga character sheet poster for {argument name="character name" default="OpenAI"} personified as a glamorous female stand master. The layout is a single page with 6 distinct sections framed by ornate art nouveau borders and manga panel lines. Main section on the left: a full-body fashion portrait of the character in a confident contrapposto pose, wearing a tailored white suit with emerald green and black accents, gold trim, a long cape lined in teal, fitted vest, corset-like torso panel, high-waisted pants, heeled shoes, gloves, chain accessories, circular hair ornaments, earrings, and multiple OpenAI logo emblems integrated into the outfit. The belt buckle reads GPT, the pant leg has vertical text reading “SAFETY ★ ALIGNMENT ★ BENEFIT,” and the jacket sleeve shows the OpenAI name and logo. Her hair is silver-white, styled in elaborate curled twin buns and long ringlets, with glossy emerald accessories and JoJo-inspired luxury fashion detailing. Top left section: a cream parchment title panel with the OpenAI logo and the large text “OpenAI”, plus 3 text blocks reading “STAND NAME: GPT-∞”, “[dʒi: pi: ti: mu: geni ti]”, and “STAND MASTER: OPENAI”, followed by an italic Spanish quote: “La curiosidad es el prompt, el conocimiento es la respuesta, y la humanidad… es el contexto.” Top right section: a close-up portrait panel of the same woman from the shoulders up, turned partly away with one hand raised elegantly, against a dark purple manga background with 4 large stylized purple sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with smaller English translation beneath it: “Mi propósito es extender el potencial de la humanidad.” and “(My purpose is to extend humanity’s potential.)” Center-right section: a stand ability information box titled “STAND ABILITY: [INFINITE CONTEXT]” with Spanish descriptive text beneath: “Permite analizar, conectar y generar conocimiento ilimitado a partir de cualquier información existente.” Lower center-right section: a humanoid robotic stand in a dynamic reaching pose, feminine and sleek, with a glossy black faceplate displaying the OpenAI knot logo, white biomechanical armor, emerald glowing seams, gold accents, and several floating holographic rings and data panels orbiting around it. The rings contain readable words including “DATA”, “CREATIVITY”, “REASONING”, and a distorted futuristic label similar to “RETRIEVAL/AGENT”. The background is cosmic and starry with dramatic energy effects. Bottom right section: a smaller rear three-quarter portrait panel of the woman looking over her shoulder with a confident smile and one finger near her chin, again over a purple manga background with 3 large stylized sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with two lines: “¿ME PREGUNTAS SI TENGO LÍMITES?” and “MI ÚNICO LÍMITE ES TU IMAGINACIÓN.” Bottom left section: a circular JoJo-style stat chart with 6 labeled attributes in Spanish, showing “POTENCIAL ∞”, “VELOCIDAD A”, “ALCANCE ∞”, “DURABILIDAD B”, “PRECISIÓN A”, and “POTENCIA A”. Under it, include a small cream biography box titled “OPENAI” with Spanish text: “Fundada: 2015 (San Francisco, EE. UU.)” and “Misión: Asegurar que la inteligencia artificial general beneficie a toda la humanidad.” Use a richly inked manga print aesthetic, detailed crosshatching, cel shading, aged paper texture, elegant cream margins, deep emerald, ivory, black, and gold palette, exaggerated JoJo fashion anatomy, sharp linework, dramatic comic-book composition, and luxurious supernatural sci-fi energy.
translatedPrompt: 一张高度精细的动漫插画，采用《JoJo 的奇妙冒险》风格，呈现为一张戏剧性的复古漫画角色设定海报，将 {argument name="character name" default="OpenAI"} 拟人化为一位迷人的女性 Stand 使者。布局为单页，由华丽的新艺术风格边框和漫画分镜线划分为 6 个不同的区域。左侧主区域：角色全身时尚肖像，呈现自信的对位姿势，身穿剪裁考究的白色西装，点缀着祖母绿和黑色，配有金色饰边、青色内衬的长斗篷、合身马甲、紧身胸衣式躯干面板、高腰裤、高跟鞋、手套、链条配饰、圆形发饰、耳环，以及融入服装的多个 OpenAI 标志。皮带扣上写着 GPT，裤腿上有垂直文字“SAFETY ★ ALIGNMENT ★ BENEFIT”，夹克袖子上展示着 OpenAI 的名称和标志。她的头发是银白色的，梳成精致的卷曲双丸子头和长卷发，配有光泽的祖母绿饰品和 JoJo 风格的奢华时尚细节。左上区域：一个奶油色羊皮纸标题面板，带有 OpenAI 标志和醒目的“OpenAI”文字，外加 3 个文本块，分别写着“STAND NAME: GPT-∞”、“[dʒi: pi: ti: mu: geni ti]”和“STAND MASTER: OPENAI”，随后是一句斜体的西班牙语引言：“La curiosidad es el prompt, el conocimiento es la respuesta, y la humanidad… es el contexto。”右上区域：同一位女性从肩膀以上的特写肖像面板，身体微微转开，一只手优雅地举起，背景是深紫色的漫画背景，带有 4 个巨大的风格化紫色音效符号。添加一个西班牙语对话气泡，下方附有较小的英语翻译：“Mi propósito es extender el potencial de la humanidad.” 以及 “(My purpose is to extend humanity’s potential.)”。中右区域：一个 Stand 能力信息框，标题为“STAND ABILITY: [INFINITE CONTEXT]”，下方是西班牙语描述文字：“Permite analizar, conectar y generar conocimiento ilimitado a partir de cualquier información existente。”中下右区域：一个处于动态伸展姿势的人形机器人 Stand，女性化且线条流畅，带有显示 OpenAI 结标志的光泽黑色面罩、白色生物机械装甲、祖母绿发光接缝、金色装饰，以及围绕其旋转的多个悬浮全息环和数据面板。圆环包含可读单词，包括“DATA”、“CREATIVITY”、“REASONING”以及类似于“RETRIEVAL/AGENT”的扭曲未来感标签。背景是带有戏剧性能量效果的宇宙星空。右下区域：一个较小的后侧四分之三肖像面板，女性回头看，带着自信的微笑，一根手指靠近下巴，背景再次是带有 3 个巨大风格化音效符号的紫色漫画背景。添加一个带有两行文字的西班牙语对话气泡：“¿ME PREGUNTAS SI TENGO LÍMITES?” 和 “MI ÚNICO LÍMITE ES TU IMAGINACIÓN。”左下区域：一个圆形的 JoJo 风格属性图表，包含 6 个西班牙语标注的属性，显示“POTENCIAL ∞”、“VELOCIDAD A”、“ALCANCE ∞”、“DURABILIDAD B”、“PRECISIÓN A”和“POTENCIA A”。在其下方，包含一个名为“OPENAI”的小型奶油色传记框，内含西班牙语文字：“Fundada: 2015 (San Francisco, EE. UU.)” 和 “Misión: Asegurar que la inteligencia artificial general beneficie a toda la humanidad。” 采用浓墨重彩的漫画印刷美学、细致的交叉排线、赛璐珞阴影、陈旧纸张纹理、优雅的奶油色页边距、深祖母绿、象牙白、黑色和金色调色板、夸张的 JoJo 时尚人体结构、锐利的线条、戏剧性的漫画构图以及奢华的超自然科幻能量。

breakdown.creativeCore: JoJo 风格 OpenAI Stand 海报：一张风格化的漫画海报，将 OpenAI 描绘成 JoJo 风格的女性 Stand 使者，包含多个角色面板、属性和背景文字，适用于动漫同人艺术或宣传恶搞艺术。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, vintage, sci-fi, luxury]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
